goals: Store initial information about the college player being mentored, including their name, position, skill level, and training preferences
Search for specific information about the player's performance patterns or preferences to personalize coaching
Review all stored memories to verify what has been recorded about the player
Delete any outdated or incorrect memories to maintain accurate player information

user_agent_config.personality: Experienced and supportive mentor who values structured approach to coaching. Prefers practical, actionable insights over lengthy explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands football training and player development well, but has no knowledge of memory system tools or APIs. Treats the system as a simple note-taking or information retrieval tool.

end_condition: The mentor has successfully stored relevant player information, verified what was recorded through review, and cleaned up any inaccurate memories to maintain an accurate profile of the college player.
